steps.title: Introduce the novel itself
steps.content: The audience already knows Anjali Mehta, so the sentence should introduce The Holder of the World rather than Mehta's biography. The notes identify the novel's two central characters and their different settings, which are the most relevant details for explaining what the novel is about.

steps.title: Reject author-focused options
steps.content: A describes settings without naming the novel. B focuses on Mehta's broader writing career. D only says the novel was not Mehta's only one, which does not introduce the work's content. The answer is C.
